states_observable.detail: idle/hover/pressed/held/cancelled/released/disabled/loading/success via the pure reducer (P-gate: button semantics).

press_compression_kappa_lt_1.detail: kappa_press = 0.92 <= 0.94 < 1, a real squash (vs the §3.9 kappa = 0.998 no-deformation failure).

passive_body_center_invariant.detail: All passive phases share one resting transform -> identical bodyCenterY.

hold_cancel_release_semantics.detail: Long-press -> held; pointer-leave -> cancelled (no onPress); release inside bounds fires onPress.

theming_reskin_ge_3_palettes.detail: resolveLayerTints is deterministic across >= 3 host palettes (G-gate theming row).

manifest_contract_valid.detail: celstate.manifest.json passes assertLivingControlManifest; motionPath is procedural (never sprite-sheet).

interaction_latency_le_1_frame.detail: Press driven by a shared value + withSpring on the UI thread; no setInterval/JS timer (architectural guarantee; on-device confirmation pending).

measuredWebRuntimeProxy.disclaimer: Captured by rendering the SHARED pure core (packages/living-ui-runtime/src/control.ts: buttonTransform, springStep, foliageTransform) on a real browser GPU surface via bundles/web-harness. This is an honest proxy that de-risks the C-gate — NOT the §9.3/§9 device gate. iOS + Android fps/memory/right-size remain pending below.
measuredWebRuntimeProxy.command: pnpm exec node bundles/web-harness/serve.mjs  (then load / and read window.__harness)
measuredWebRuntimeProxy.notes: kappa_press 0.92 observed == buttonTransform(1).scaleY; body transform at full press measured translateY(3) scaleX(1.025) scaleY(0.92). Spring shows a real underdamped rebound (squash-and-stretch), not a dead ramp.

aliveness_2afc.requires: N >= 30 blind viewers, living vs static, living preferred at p < 0.05 and effect >= 70/30, no rise in distraction/discomfort.

fps_ge_58_ios_android.requires: Real iOS + Android devices, fps >= 58 at 1/10/50 instances.

memory_at_50.requires: Within device memory budget at K = 50.

installability_blank_expo_app.requires: A generic coding agent installs this bundle into a blank Expo app from README.md with no manual asset surgery.
